allow: Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT name, active, triggerCount FROM workflow_entity;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT ee.id, ee.status, substr\(ed.data, 1, 500\) FROM execution_entity ee JOIN execution_data ed ON ee.id = ed.executionId WHERE ee.workflowId='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP' ORDER BY ee.startedAt DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT ed.data FROM execution_entity ee JOIN execution_data ed ON ee.id = ed.executionId WHERE ee.workflowId='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP' ORDER BY ee.startedAt DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT active, updatedAt FROM workflow_entity WHERE id='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP';")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT datetime\('now','localtime'\) AS now_jst, datetime\(max\(startedAt\),'+9 hours'\) AS last_run_jst FROM execution_entity WHERE workflowId='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP';")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT status, count\(*\) FROM execution_entity WHERE workflowId='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP' AND startedAt >= '2026-04-20' GROUP BY status;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT datetime\(startedAt,'+9 hours'\) AS jst, status FROM execution_entity WHERE workflowId='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP' AND startedAt >= '2026-04-20' AND status='error' ORDER BY startedAt ASC;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.n8n/database.sqlite "SELECT datetime\(min\(startedAt\),'+9 hours'\), datetime\(max\(startedAt\),'+9 hours'\) FROM execution_entity WHERE workflowId='TuQn8cgrU8dTl2YP' AND startedAt >= '2026-04-20';")
